title: 日本ダービーの後に・目指すべきは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet manages to snatch the win from
Vodka in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she can't shake the feeling that Vodka's
stirring performance has somehow made her the
real number one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She proclaims she will beat Vodka again, lest her
rival get too far ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Shuka Sho, the last race of the
Triple Tiara.
